response.justification: The candidate is technically an excellent match on skills — strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, relational databases, Kubernetes, AWS, and even the nice-to-have LLM/MCP and agentic-tooling experience. However, with roughly 15+ years of experience and current Staff Engineer standing, he is significantly overqualified for an entry-level junior/mid role, raising retention and compensation-fit risks. The listed location (Lagos, Nigeria) also conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement, which needs clarification before proceeding.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple product companies
Hands-on LLM/MCP, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes experience matching all nice-to-have qualifications
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing culture, teaching/workshops)
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level position — flight and engagement risk
Current location (Lagos, Nigeria) conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement
No explicit Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience (MongoDB/MySQL listed instead)
